headline: Robinhood Slides 6%: 3 Reasons the Market Is Not Impressed by the Buyback
summary: Robinhood Markets (NASDAQ:HOOD) stock is falling 6% in early trading Friday, pulling back from an opening price of $70.35 to around $66. The move adds to a bruising stretch for HOOD shares, which are now down 41% year to date. The catalyst drawing attention is Robinhood’s newly announced $1.5 billion share repurchase program. headline: Peter Schiff Sounds Alarm On Bitcoin-Backed Mortgages
summary: Economist Peter Schiff is sounding the alarm over a new housing finance initiative. The plan allows borrowers to use digital assets for home purchases. Schiff argues the move creates a “free ride” for crypto holders at the expense of the public.
